# Visual Directions

## User Taste Evidence And Gaps

The owner prefers calm editorial interfaces and rejects ornamental commerce patterns. No target-user visual preference evidence exists.

## Shared Comparison Setup

All directions were compared on Home and the Detail error state at the same mobile viewport and with the same fixture content.

## Direction A — Calm Index

Quiet editorial hierarchy, compact catalog rhythm, clear status copy, and restrained teal emphasis.

## Direction B — Object Focus

Larger item media and warmer surfaces, with stronger focus on one object at a time.

## Comparison

Direction A preserves faster scanning and clearer recovery. Direction B is more expressive but reduces catalog density.

## User Decision Status

User approved Direction A after reviewing both comparable specimens.

## Chosen Direction

Calm Index.
